title: Walk-in Drive Production Engineer at Jindal Steel & Power

jsonLd.title: Walk-in Drive Production Engineer at Jindal Steel & Power
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Production Engineer with drive and ambition, Jindal Steel & Power in Bengaluru is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Jindal Steel & Power:
Jindal Steel & Power is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in FMEA

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Professional development and training programs
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Bengaluru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Jindal Steel & Power!
